title: Personal Identity Schema
description: A machine-readable specification for personal identity. Designed to constrain LLM generation for consistent, authentic output across tools and contexts.

layers.name: Identity
layers.description: Who you are at the core. The irreducible truth that survives every pivot, rebrand, and market shift.

layers.name: Positioning
layers.description: Where you stand relative to everyone else. Not what you do — what only you do.

layers.name: Strategy
layers.description: How you win. The decision logic that connects identity to action.

layers.name: Story
layers.description: The narrative that makes the identity legible. Not fabricated — excavated from what actually happened.

layers.name: Voice
layers.description: How you sound when you're being honest. The linguistic fingerprint that no prompt can fake.

layers.name: Worldview
layers.description: What you believe to be true about the world. The convictions that shape every decision before you notice.

layers.name: Principles
layers.description: The lines you won't cross. The constraints that make the identity durable under pressure.

layers.name: Evidence
layers.description: Proof. Not claims — artifacts. The things you've done that make everything above undeniable.
